sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, text_column String, num_column Int32);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, text_column, num_column) VALUES (1, 'абвг', 10), (2, 'д', 20), (3, '', 0);
SELECT rightPadUTF8(text_column, 7, '*') AS padded_text, num_column FROM test_table WHERE num_column GLOBAL IN (SELECT num_column FROM test_table WHERE text_column != '');
SELECT id, rightPadUTF8(text_column, 10) AS padded_text FROM test_table WHERE text_column GLOBAL IN (SELECT text_column FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) ORDER BY padded_text;
SELECT text_column, rightPadUTF8(text_column, 5) AS padded_text FROM test_table HAVING padded_text LIKE '%*';
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id UInt32, status Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_table2 (id, status) VALUES (1, 'active'), (2, NULL), (3, 'inactive');
SELECT rightPadUTF8(status, 10, '-') AS padded_status FROM test_table2 WHERE id GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_table2 WHERE status IS NOT NULL);

SELECT t1.id, rightPadUTF8(t1.text_column, 5) AS padded_text, t2.status FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.status GLOBAL IN (SELECT status FROM test_table2 WHERE status IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY padded_text;
SELECT RIGHT_PAD_UTF8(text_column, 5) AS padded, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY padded HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
